Name.description: SKU service type name. Maximum of 100 characters.

IsActive.description: Defines if the SKU service type is active or not.

ShowOnCartFront.description: Defines if the SKU service type is displayed on the cart screen.

ShowOnAttachmentFront.description: Defines if the SKU service type has an attachment.

ShowOnFileUpload.description: Defines if the SKU service type can be associated with an attachment or not.

IsGiftCard.description: Defines if the SKU service type is displayed as a Gift Card.

IsRequired.description: Defines if the SKU service type is mandatory.
